message.content:
Explore the exam system codebase at D:\project\pt-gitlab\exams to understand:

1. Database table structure - look for entity classes, DDL files, or migration scripts related to exams, exam records, answers, users
2. The API endpoints for taking/submitting an exam (not admin endpoints, but student-facing ones)
3. How exam submission works - the full flow from a user starting an exam to submitting answers
4. The data models (entities/DTOs) for exam records and answers

Focus on:
- exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/entity/
- exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/controller/ (non-admin)
- exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/service/
- Any SQL/DDL files

Be thorough - I need to understand table columns, field types, and relationships.
